steps.title: Use the visual context
steps.content: The poem describes a fern and its reflection blending so perfectly that even the sharpest vision cannot define the border line. In context, the word concerns making out or seeing the boundary.

steps.title: Choose the closest meaning
steps.content: B means shorten, which has nothing to do with seeing a boundary. C means state again. D means clarify in words, but the line is about what vision can detect. The closest meaning is perceive. The answer is A.
